picks.title: National Poetry Month: Rap as Storytelling
picks.why: Learn how rap tells stories with a Bay Area performing arts educator—creative, engaging, and perfect for spring break curiosity.

picks.title: ICYMI Movie: Spring Break Edition
picks.why: Free spring break movie screening of The Princess Bride at Palo Alto Library—timeless family fun, no ticket needed.

picks.title: Craft Club for Adults: The Joy of Drawing - Tulips in Spring
picks.why: Draw and paint tulips in spring at Saratoga Library's craft workshop—seasonal art class celebrating the season's beauty together.

picks.title: Pelicans, Herons, and Egrets, Oh My!
picks.why: Wildlife photographer Joan Sparks shares elegant wading birds at Los Altos Library—nature education perfect for curious spring break kids.

picks.title: 2026 Latinx Art Now! Exhibition  Auction
picks.why: Free Latinx Art Now exhibition at MACLA showcases contemporary Bay Area artists—culturally rich, visually stunning, all-ages exploration.
